questions.question: Electricity ka flow kya kehlata hai?

options.B: Current

questions.explanation: Current electrons ka flow hota hai jo ek circuit mein move karte hain.

questions.question: Ohm's Law ka formula kya hai?

options.B: I = V*R

questions.explanation: Ohm's Law ke according, Voltage (V) Current (I) aur Resistance (R) ke product ke barabar hota hai.

questions.question: Kis unit mein electrical power ko measure kiya jata hai?

options.B: Volt

questions.explanation: Electrical power ko Watts (W) mein measure kiya jata hai.

questions.question: AC current ki direction kaise hoti hai?

options.B: Periodically change hoti hai

questions.explanation: Alternating Current (AC) mein current ki direction periodically change hoti rehti hai.

questions.question: Ek multimeter ka kya use hai?

options.B: Sirf current measure karna
options.C: Voltage, current aur resistance measure karna

questions.explanation: Multimeter ek versatile tool hai jo voltage, current aur resistance jaisi electrical quantities ko measure karta hai.

questions.question: Fuse ka kya kaam hai ek electrical circuit mein?

options.B: Circuit ko overload se bachana

questions.explanation: Fuse ek safety device hai jo excessive current flow hone par circuit ko break karke damage se bachata hai.

questions.question: Semiconductor material ka ek common example kya hai?

options.B: Gold

questions.explanation: Silicon ek widely used semiconductor material hai jo electronic components jaise diodes aur transistors mein istemal hota hai.

questions.question: Parallel circuit mein total resistance kaise calculate karte hain?

options.B: Reciprocals ko add karke fir uska reciprocal

questions.explanation: Parallel circuit mein total resistance nikalne ke liye, individual resistances ke reciprocals ko add karke fir total ka reciprocal lete hain.

questions.question: Earth wire ka kya purpose hai electrical wiring mein?

options.B: Overload se bachana

questions.explanation: Earth wire ek safety feature hai jo fault current ko ground mein divert karke electrical shock ke khatre ko kam karta hai.

questions.question: Ek capacitor ka primary function kya hai?

options.B: Electrical energy store karna

questions.explanation: Capacitor electrical energy ko electric field ke form mein store karta hai.

questions.question: Diode ka kya function hai?

options.A: AC ko DC mein convert karna (Rectification)
options.B: DC ko AC mein convert karna

questions.explanation: Diode current ko sirf ek direction mein flow hone deta hai, iska use AC ko DC mein convert karne (rectification) mein hota hai.

questions.question: Ek resistor ka colour code 'Red, Red, Brown, Gold' hai. Iski value kya hogi?
questions.explanation: Red=2, Red=2, Brown=10^1 (multiplier), Gold=±5% (tolerance). So, 22 * 10^1 = 220 Ohm ± 5%.

questions.question: Soldering iron ka primary use kya hai electronics mein?

options.B: Components ko permanently join karna

questions.explanation: Soldering iron ka use solder wire ko melt karke electronic components ko PCB ya wires se electrically aur mechanically join karne ke liye hota hai.

questions.question: Short circuit kya hota hai?

options.B: Low resistance path jahan current abnormally flow karta hai
options.C: Open circuit jahan current flow nahi hota
options.D: Circuit jahan voltage bahut kam hai

questions.explanation: Short circuit tab hota hai jab current ko ek low resistance path mil jata hai, jisse bahut zyada current flow hota hai aur circuit damage ho sakta hai.

questions.question: Transformer ka kya kaam hai?

options.A: DC voltage ko badhana ya kam karna
options.B: AC voltage ko badhana ya kam karna
options.C: AC ko DC mein convert karna

questions.explanation: Transformer AC voltage ko step-up ya step-down karne ke liye use hota hai, mutual induction principle par kaam karta hai.

questions.question: Ek transistor ka primary use kya hai?

options.B: Current ko sirf ek disha mein flow karna
options.C: Electronic signal ko amplify ya switch karna

questions.explanation: Transistor ek semiconductor device hai jo electronic signals ko amplify karne ya electronic switches ke roop mein kaam karne ke liye use hota hai.

questions.question: Electrical shock lagne par sabse pehla step kya hona chahiye?

options.B: Victim ko pakad kar khichna
options.D: Doctor ko call karna (power disconnect kiye bina)

questions.explanation: Sabse pehle power source ko disconnect karna chahiye taaki aur koi shock na lage aur victim ko safely alag kiya ja sake.

questions.question: DTH ka full form kya hai?

options.B: Digital To Home

questions.explanation: DTH ka full form Direct To Home hai, jismein TV signals directly satellite se ghar tak aate hain.

questions.question: DTH system mein TV signals kiske through transmit hote hain?

options.B: Terrestrial antennas

questions.explanation: DTH system mein signals geostationary satellites se receive hote hain.

questions.question: DTH system ka main component jo satellite se signals receive karta hai?

options.B: LNB (Low Noise Block)

questions.explanation: Dish Antenna satellite se signals ko collect karta hai aur LNB tak pahunchata hai.

questions.question: LNB ka kya kaam hai DTH system mein?

options.A: Signals ko amplify karna aur frequency down-convert karna
options.B: Signals ko decode karna

questions.explanation: LNB (Low Noise Block) dish se receive hue high-frequency signals ko amplify karta hai aur unhe lower frequency mein convert karta hai taki coaxial cable ke through STB tak pahunchaya ja sake.

questions.question: STB (Set-Top Box) ka kya function hai DTH system mein?

options.B: Down-converted signals ko decode karke TV par display karna
options.C: Dish antenna ko power supply karna

questions.explanation: Set-Top Box LNB se aaye hue signals ko decode karta hai aur unhe TV par dekhne layak format mein convert karta hai.

questions.question: DTH system mein kis type ka cable use hota hai dish se STB tak signals le jaane ke liye?

options.B: Ethernet cable

questions.explanation: Coaxial cable high-frequency signals ko long distances tak transmit karne ke liye ideal hota hai, aur DTH mein dish se STB tak use hota hai.

questions.question: DTH system mein polarization ka kya role hai?

options.A: Dish antenna ka size determine karna
options.B: Signals ki quality improve karna
options.C: Ek hi frequency band par multiple signals transmit karna

questions.explanation: Polarization (Horizontal/Vertical) ka use karke ek hi frequency band par do alag-alag signals ko transmit kiya ja sakta hai, jisse bandwidth ka efficient use hota hai.

questions.question: DTH mein signals ko encrypt karne ka kya karan hai?

options.B: Unauthorized viewing ko rokna

questions.explanation: Signals ko encrypt kiya jata hai taki sirf authorized subscribers hi unhe decrypt karke dekh saken, jiske liye ek smart card ki zaroorat hoti hai.

questions.question: Smart Card ka kya use hai DTH Set-Top Box mein?

options.B: Channels ko decrypt karna aur subscription ko manage karna

questions.explanation: Smart Card mein subscriber ki details aur subscription information hoti hai, jo encrypted channels ko decrypt karne mein help karti hai.

questions.question: DTH mein dish antenna kis direction mein align kiya jata hai?

options.B: South
options.D: Uss particular satellite ki position ki taraf

questions.explanation: Dish antenna ko exactly uss geostationary satellite ki taraf align karna hota hai jisse signals receive karne hain.

questions.question: Ku-band frequencies DTH mein kyon use hoti hain?

options.A: Ye bahut kam range ki hoti hain
options.B: Inhe chote dish antennas se receive kiya ja sakta hai
options.D: Ye rain fade se unaffected rehti hain

questions.explanation: Ku-band frequencies high hoti hain, jiske karan unhe receive karne ke liye comparatively chote dish antennas (60-90 cm) ki zaroorat hoti hai. Lekin ye rain fade se affect hoti hain.

questions.question: Universal LNB kya hota hai?

options.A: Sirf ek polarization receive karta hai
options.B: Multiple satellites se signals receive karta hai
options.C: Do alag-alag frequency bands aur polarizations ko handle karta hai
options.D: Sirf C-band signals receive karta hai

questions.explanation: Universal LNB do alag-alag frequency bands (low/high) aur dono polarizations (horizontal/vertical) ko handle kar sakta hai, jo modern DTH systems mein common hai.

questions.question: DTH system mein 'transponder' ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Satellite par laga hua ek device jo signals receive aur re-transmit karta hai

questions.explanation: Transponder satellite par laga ek unit hai jo earth se uplinks receive karta hai, unhe amplify karta hai aur fir downlinks ke through earth par wapas transmit karta hai.

questions.question: DTH mein 'EPG' ka full form kya hai?

options.B: Essential Program Gateway

questions.explanation: EPG (Electronic Program Guide) TV channels par chal rahe aur aane wale programs ki list aur details provide karta hai.

questions.question: DTH signals ki strength ko kis unit mein measure kiya jata hai?

options.B: Amperes

questions.explanation: Signals ki strength aur quality ko decibels (dB) mein measure kiya jata hai, jaise dBmV ya dBm.

questions.question: DTH mein 'Rain Fade' kya hai?

options.A: Dish antenna par baarish ka pani jamna
options.B: Heavy rain ke karan satellite signals ka weak hona ya loss hona
options.C: STB ka baarish mein kharab hona
options.D: Coaxial cable ka baarish mein damage hona

questions.explanation: Rain Fade ek phenomenon hai jismein heavy rainfall ke karan satellite signals absorb ya scatter ho jate hain, jisse signal strength kam ho jati hai.

questions.question: DTH connection mein 'Line of Sight' kyon important hai?

options.A: Taki STB ko achi ventilation mile
options.B: Taki dish antenna ko satellite se direct unobstructed view mile
options.C: Taki cable TV signals ko bhi receive kar saken
options.D: Taki technician ko install karne mein aasani ho

questions.explanation: Line of Sight ka matlab hai ki dish antenna aur satellite ke beech koi physical obstruction (jaise building, ped) nahi hona chahiye, taaki signals bina rukavat ke receive ho saken.

questions.question: Cable TV system mein signals ghar tak kaise pahunchte hain?

options.B: Dish antenna ke through
options.C: Coaxial cables ke network ke through

questions.explanation: Cable TV mein signals ek central headend se coaxial cable ke extensive network ke through subscribers ke gharon tak pahunchte hain.

questions.question: Cable TV system ka central point jahan se signals originate hote hain, use kya kehte hain?

options.B: Set-Top Box

questions.explanation: Headend ek facility hoti hai jahan TV channels ke signals receive, process aur distribute kiye jaate hain cable network mein.

questions.question: Cable TV mein signals ko amplify karne ke liye kya use hota hai?

options.B: Splitter

questions.explanation: Cable network mein long distances par signals weak ho jate hain, unhe amplify karne ke liye amplifiers (boosters) use kiye jaate hain.

questions.question: Cable TV mein ek signal ko kai TVs par distribute karne ke liye kis device ka use hota hai?

options.B: Splitter

questions.explanation: Splitter ek device hai jo ek incoming RF signal ko do ya do se zyada outgoing signals mein divide karta hai.

questions.question: Cable TV mein 'Tap' ka kya function hai?

options.B: Main distribution line se subscriber tak signals ko isolate aur provide karna

questions.explanation: Tap ek device hai jo main cable TV distribution line se ek small portion of signal ko subscriber drop cable tak provide karta hai, baaki signal ko main line mein aage jane deta hai.

questions.question: Digital Cable TV mein STB ka kya role hai?

options.B: Digital signals ko decode karke TV par display karna
options.C: Cable network ko power supply karna

questions.explanation: Digital Cable TV mein STB digital signals ko receive karta hai, unhe decrypt aur decode karta hai taki TV par dekha ja sake.

questions.question: Hybrid Fiber-Coaxial (HFC) network mein fiber optic cable kahan tak use hota hai?

options.B: Sirf Headend ke andar
options.C: Neighbourhood nodes tak, fir coaxial cable use hota hai

questions.explanation: HFC network mein fiber optic cable Headend se neighbourhood nodes tak signals le jata hai, aur fir node se subscribers ke ghar tak coaxial cable use hota hai.

questions.question: Analog Cable TV aur Digital Cable TV mein kya main difference hai?

options.A: Analog mein STB ki zaroorat hoti hai, Digital mein nahi
options.B: Digital mein picture quality aur channel capacity behtar hoti hai
options.C: Analog mein zyada channels milte hain
options.D: Digital mein sirf radio channels milte hain

questions.explanation: Digital Cable TV compressed signals use karta hai, jisse behtar picture aur sound quality milti hai, aur ek hi bandwidth mein zyada channels transmit kiye ja sakte hain.

questions.question: Cable TV mein 'Return Path' kiska part hai?

options.B: Subscriber se Headend tak data (jaise interactive services) transmit karne ka
options.C: Sirf Headend se subscriber tak data ka

questions.explanation: Return Path ek two-way communication channel hai jo subscriber se Headend tak signals (jaise internet data, video-on-demand requests) bhejta hai.

questions.question: Cable TV mein 'RF Connector' ka kya use hai?

options.B: Coaxial cables ko devices se connect karna

questions.explanation: RF (Radio Frequency) Connectors (jaise F-type connector) coaxial cables ko TVs, STBs, splitters, aur amplifiers se connect karne ke liye use hote hain.

questions.question: CATV network mein 'Trunk Cable' kya hota hai?

options.A: Subscriber ke ghar ke andar ka cable
options.B: Headend se distribution amplifiers tak jane wala main cable
options.C: TV se STB tak jane wala cable

questions.explanation: Trunk cable ek high-capacity coaxial cable hai jo Headend se major distribution points tak signals le jata hai, jahan se feeder lines branches out hoti hain.

questions.question: Cable TV systems mein 'Modulator' ka kya kaam hai?

options.B: Video aur audio signals ko RF carrier par place karna

questions.explanation: Modulator baseband video aur audio signals ko high-frequency RF carrier signal par modulate karta hai taki unhe cable network par transmit kiya ja sake.

questions.question: Cable TV network mein 'Drop Cable' kya hota hai?

options.A: Headend se main trunk line tak ka cable
options.B: Ek pole ya pedestal se subscriber ke ghar tak jane wala cable
options.C: STB se TV tak ka cable
options.D: Power supply ke liye use hone wala cable

questions.explanation: Drop cable ek coaxial cable hai jo distribution network ke last point (tap) se subscriber ke premises tak signals le jata hai.

questions.question: Cable TV mein 'Signal Leakage' ka kya matlab hai?

options.A: Signals ka bahut zyada amplify hona
options.B: Signals ka cable se bahar nikal kar air mein radiate hona
options.D: Signals ka galat direction mein jana

questions.explanation: Signal leakage tab hota hai jab cable TV system se RF signals leak hokar air mein radiate hote hain, jo other wireless services (jaise aircraft communication) mein interference kar sakte hain.

questions.question: Cable TV mein 'CMTS' ka full form kya hai?

options.B: Central Multimedia Transmission System

questions.explanation: CMTS (Cable Modem Termination System) ek Headend device hai jo cable modems ke liye high-speed data services provide karta hai, internet access ke liye crucial hai.

questions.question: Cable TV mein 'Attenuator' ka kya use hai?

options.B: Signals ki strength ko kam karna

questions.explanation: Attenuator ek passive device hai jo signals ki strength ko ek controlled amount se kam karta hai, jab signal bahut zyada strong ho.

questions.question: Cable TV mein 'F-connector' ka installation karte samay kis baat ka dhyan rakhna chahiye?

options.A: Inner conductor braid se touch na kare
options.B: Outer jacket ko poora hata dena

questions.explanation: F-connector install karte samay yeh ensure karna bahut zaroori hai ki inner conductor (center wire) outer braid (shield) se touch na kare, warna short circuit ho jayega.

questions.question: Naya DTH connection install karte samay sabse pehla step kya hai?

options.B: Dish antenna mount karna

questions.explanation: Installation se pehle sahi location (Line of Sight, accessibility) ke liye site survey karna bahut zaroori hai.

questions.question: Dish antenna ko mount karte samay kis baat ka dhyan rakhna chahiye?

options.B: Wo easily move ho sake
options.C: Wo stable aur secure ho, aur satellite ki taraf unobstructed view ho

questions.explanation: Dish antenna ko aisi jagah par mount karna chahiye jahan wo stable ho, tez hawa mein hile nahi aur satellite se signals receive karne ke liye clear line of sight ho.

questions.question: Dish alignment ke liye kis tool ka use hota hai?

options.B: Satellite Finder Meter

questions.explanation: Satellite Finder Meter dish antenna ko sahi satellite par align karne ke liye signal strength aur quality ko measure karta hai.

questions.question: DTH mein 'No Signal' error aane ka common reason kya ho sakta hai?

options.B: Dish ka misalignment ya cable problem

questions.explanation: 'No Signal' error usually dish antenna ke misalignment, LNB mein problem, ya coaxial cable ke damage hone ke karan aata hai.

questions.question: LNB ko replace karte samay kis baat ka dhyan rakhna chahiye?

options.A: Kisi bhi LNB ko use kar sakte hain
options.B: Polarization aur skew angle ko sahi set karna

questions.explanation: LNB ko replace karte samay uski polarization setting (horizontal/vertical) aur skew angle ko sahi tarah se adjust karna zaroori hai taaki maximum signal reception ho.

questions.question: DTH cable installation mein 'Waterproofing' kyon zaroori hai?

options.A: Taki cable zyada garam na ho
options.B: Taki signals fast transmit hon
options.C: Taki moisture se connectors ko damage hone se bachaya ja sake
options.D: Taki cable ka colour kharab na ho

questions.explanation: Connectors par moisture ya paani jane se signal loss aur corrosion ho sakta hai, isliye unhe waterproof karna bahut zaroori hai.

questions.question: STB mein 'Software Update' kyon kiya jata hai?

options.B: Performance improve karne, bugs fix karne ya naye features add karne ke liye
options.C: Dish ko align karne ke liye
options.D: Smart card ko charge karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Software updates STB ki functionality ko behtar banate hain aur security patches provide karte hain.

questions.question: DTH mein 'Pixelation' ya 'Tiling' ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Picture ka blocks mein tootna ya freeze hona

questions.explanation: Pixelation ya tiling weak signal, high bit error rate, ya signal interference ke karan hota hai, jismein picture blocks mein divide ho jati hai.

questions.question: Agar remote control kaam nahi kar raha hai, toh sabse pehle kya check karna chahiye?

options.B: TV ki power
options.C: Remote ki batteries aur line of sight

questions.explanation: Remote control ki batteries check karna aur ensure karna ki remote aur STB ke IR sensor ke beech koi obstruction nahi hai, ye sabse common troubleshooting step hai.

questions.question: DTH installation mein 'Azimuth' aur 'Elevation' angles kyon important hain?

options.A: Dish ka weight check karne ke liye
options.B: Dish ko satellite ki exact position par point karne ke liye
options.C: Cable ki length decide karne ke liye
options.D: LNB ka type decide karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Azimuth (horizontal angle) aur Elevation (vertical angle) do critical angles hain jo dish antenna ko satellite ki exact location ki taraf point karne ke liye adjust kiye jaate hain.

questions.question: Agar DTH system mein 'Signal Loss' ki problem aa rahi hai toh kya check karenge?

options.B: Dish alignment, LNB, aur coaxial cable integrity

questions.explanation: Signal loss ke liye, dish ki alignment, LNB ki functionality, aur coaxial cable (cuts, loose connections) ko thoroughly check karna chahiye.

questions.question: DTH installation mein 'Grounding' kyon zaroori hai?

options.A: Signals ko amplify karne ke liye
options.B: Lightning protection aur electrical safety ke liye
options.C: Cable ki life badhane ke liye
options.D: Picture quality improve karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Dish antenna aur STB ko ground karna lightning strikes se damage aur electrical shock se bachav ke liye bahut zaroori hai.

questions.question: Agar STB 'Boot Loop' mein hai (bar-bar restart ho raha hai) toh kya solution ho sakta hai?

options.B: Power cycle (power off/on) karna ya software update check karna

questions.explanation: Boot loop usually software glitch ya power supply issue ke karan hota hai. Power cycle ya fir software update (agar possible ho) try karna chahiye. Nahi toh STB replacement.

questions.question: DTH system mein 'SNR' (Signal to Noise Ratio) ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Desired signal strength aur unwanted noise ki strength ka ratio

questions.explanation: SNR ek critical metric hai jo signal quality ko batata hai. Higher SNR matlab behtar signal quality aur kam noise.

questions.question: Agar DTH remote STB par kaam nahi kar raha hai, lekin STB ke buttons kaam kar rahe hain, toh kya issue ho sakta hai?

options.B: Remote ki batteries dead hain ya remote kharab hai

questions.explanation: Agar STB ke buttons kaam kar rahe hain, toh problem remote control mein hi hai. Batteries check karein ya remote ko replace karein.

questions.question: DTH installation mein 'Compression F-connector' kyon prefer kiya jata hai crimp type se?

options.B: Ye zyada durable aur weather-resistant connection provide karta hai
options.C: Ye zyada signals receive karta hai
options.D: Ye install karna mushkil hota hai

questions.explanation: Compression F-connectors ek weather-tight aur electrically superior connection provide karte hain jo moisture ingress aur signal loss ko kam karta hai, crimp type se behtar hai.

questions.question: Dish antenna par 'rust' lagne se kya problem ho sakti hai?

options.A: Dish ka colour change ho jayega
options.B: Signal reception par asar pad sakta hai aur dish ki structural integrity kam ho sakti hai
options.D: LNB ki life kam ho jayegi

questions.explanation: Rust dish antenna ki reflective surface ko damage kar sakta hai, jisse signal reception weak ho sakta hai. Saath hi, rust se dish ki structural strength bhi kam ho jati hai.

questions.question: Cable TV installation mein drop cable ko ghar mein kaise enter karna chahiye?

options.B: Diwar mein drill karke aur proper sealing ke saath

questions.explanation: Drop cable ko diwar mein drill karke, drip loop banakar aur hole ko sealant se seal karke enter karna chahiye, taaki paani ya insects andar na ja sakein.

questions.question: Cable TV signal loss ka ek common cause kya hai?

options.B: Loose ya damaged F-connectors

questions.explanation: Loose ya damaged F-connectors signal leakage aur signal loss ka ek bahut common reason hote hain cable TV systems mein.

questions.question: Agar TV par 'Snowy' picture aa rahi hai (analog cable TV), toh kya problem ho sakti hai?

options.B: Signal bahut weak hai

questions.explanation: Analog cable TV mein snowy picture (noise) ka matlab hai ki signal bahut weak hai aur usmein noise ka level zyada hai.

questions.question: Cable TV mein 'Ghosting' ya 'Multipath' ka kya karan hai?

options.B: Signal ka multiple paths se TV tak pahunchna

questions.explanation: Ghosting tab hota hai jab TV signal ek se zyada paths se receiver tak pahunchta hai, jisse screen par ek faint duplicate image dikhti hai.

questions.question: Ek ghar mein multiple TVs par cable TV chalane ke liye kya use hota hai?

options.B: Sirf ek STB
options.C: Ek hi cable ko cut karke join karna

questions.explanation: Digital cable TV ke liye har TV par ek STB lagana padta hai. Analog ya digital signals ko distribute karne ke liye splitter use hota hai, jiske baad har TV par STB ya direct connection ho sakta hai.

questions.question: Coaxial cable ko bend karte samay kis baat ka dhyan rakhna chahiye?

options.B: Minimum bend radius maintain karna
options.C: Bend karne se signal quality improve hoti hai
options.D: Use kisi bhi angle par bend kar sakte hain

questions.explanation: Coaxial cable ko bahut zyada bend karne se uski inner structure damage ho sakti hai, jisse signal loss aur impedance mismatch ho sakta hai. Always maintain minimum bend radius.

questions.question: Agar cable TV channels 'Scrambled' dikh rahe hain, toh kya problem ho sakti hai?

options.B: Subscription expired hai ya smart card issue hai

questions.explanation: Scrambled channels ka matlab hai ki signals encrypted hain aur unhe decrypt karne ke liye valid subscription aur working smart card ki zaroorat hai.

questions.question: Cable TV network mein 'Ingress Noise' kya hai?

options.B: External RF signals ka cable network mein enter karna
options.C: STB se generate hone wala noise
options.D: Power supply se aane wala noise

questions.explanation: Ingress noise tab hota hai jab external radio frequency signals (jaise radio, TV broadcasts, mobile phones) damaged cables ya loose connectors ke through cable TV network mein enter karte hain aur picture quality ko degrade karte hain.

questions.question: Cable TV troubleshooting mein 'Signal Level Meter' ka kya use hai?

options.B: Signals ki strength aur quality ko measure karna
options.D: STB ki power consumption check karna

questions.explanation: Signal Level Meter cable TV signals ki strength, frequency aur quality ko precise tarike se measure karta hai, troubleshooting mein bahut useful hai.

questions.question: Agar cable TV installation ke baad TV par 'No Input' dikha raha hai, toh kya check karna chahiye?

options.A: Cable TV provider se contact karna
options.B: TV ka input source (HDMI/AV) sahi set hai ya nahi

questions.explanation: No Input error ka matlab hai ki TV ko selected input source par koi signal nahi mil raha. TV ka input source check karein aur ensure karein ki wo STB ya cable connection se match karta hai.

questions.question: Cable TV mein 'Ferrite Bead' ka kya use hai?

options.B: High frequency noise ko suppress karna

questions.explanation: Ferrite bead ek passive electronic component hai jo high frequency noise (EMI/RFI) ko suppress karta hai, jisse signal clarity improve hoti hai.

questions.question: Agar cable TV mein 'Intermittent Signal Loss' ho raha hai, toh kya possible cause hai?

options.B: Loose connections, damaged cable ya external interference

questions.explanation: Intermittent signal loss usually loose ya damaged connections, cable mein physical damage, ya external RF interference ke karan hota hai.

questions.question: Cable TV installation mein 'Drip Loop' kyon banaya jata hai?

options.A: Cable ko lamba karne ke liye
options.B: Paani ko cable ke saath ghar mein ghusne se rokne ke liye
options.C: Signals ko amplify karne ke liye
options.D: Cable ko sundar dikhane ke liye

questions.explanation: Drip loop ek chota sa curve hota hai cable mein jo building mein enter hone se pehle banaya jata hai, taaki baarish ka paani loop se tapak kar neeche gir jaye aur cable ke saath ghar ke andar na jaye.

questions.question: Agar cable TV connection par 'Hum Bars' dikh rahe hain (horizontal lines moving on screen), toh kya problem ho sakti hai?

options.B: Ground loop ya power supply noise

questions.explanation: Hum bars usually ground loop issues ya power supply mein noise ke karan aate hain, jisse picture mein horizontal lines dikhti hain.

questions.question: Cable TV installation mein 'Cable Ties' ka kya use hai?

options.B: Cables ko neatly organize aur secure karna

questions.explanation: Cable ties cables ko bundle karne, organize karne aur support dene ke liye use hote hain, jisse installation tidy aur safe rehta hai.

questions.question: Digital Cable TV mein 'Macroblocking' kya hai?

options.B: Picture ka bade, chunky blocks mein appear hona

questions.explanation: Macroblocking digital video mein ek degradation hai jismein picture bade, square blocks mein dikhti hai, usually high compression ya signal loss ke karan.

questions.question: Agar cable TV set-top box chalte chalte 'freeze' ho jaye, toh sabse pehla troubleshooting step kya hai?

options.B: Power cycle (STB ko band karke fir se chalu karna)

questions.explanation: Power cycle karna ek common aur effective troubleshooting step hai electronic devices ke liye jo freeze ho jate hain, jisse temporary glitches resolve ho jate hain.

questions.question: Electrical work karte samay sabse important safety precaution kya hai?

options.B: Power supply ko disconnect karna
options.C: Kisi ko bataye bina kaam karna

questions.explanation: Electrical hazards se bachne ke liye hamesha power supply ko disconnect karna sabse pehla aur sabse important safety step hai.

questions.question: Height par kaam karte samay kis safety equipment ka use karna chahiye?

options.B: Safety harness aur ladder

questions.explanation: Height par kaam karte samay girne se bachne ke liye safety harness aur stable ladder ka use karna bahut zaroori hai.

questions.question: Customer service mein 'Active Listening' ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Customer ki baat ko dhyan se sunna, samajhna aur sahi feedback dena
options.D: Sirf apne product ke bare mein batana

questions.explanation: Active listening mein customer ki baat ko poori tarah se sunna, uski problem ko samajhna aur uske according solution provide karna shamil hai.

questions.question: Ek technician ko customer ke ghar mein kaam karte samay kaisa behave karna chahiye?

options.A: Jaldi se kaam khatam karke chale jana
options.B: Professional, polite aur respectful rehna

questions.explanation: Professionalism, politeness aur respect customer ke saath ek accha rapport banane aur trust build karne ke liye bahut zaroori hai.

questions.question: Fiber Optic Cables, Coaxial cables se kis tarah alag hain?

options.A: Ye electrical signals transmit karte hain
options.B: Ye light signals transmit karte hain aur zyada bandwidth provide karte hain
options.D: Ye sirf short distances ke liye hote hain

questions.explanation: Fiber optic cables light pulses ka use karke data transmit karte hain, jisse ye coaxial cables se zyada bandwidth aur long distance transmission provide karte hain.

questions.question: Optical Fiber ko connect karne ke liye kis method ka use hota hai?

options.B: Crimping

questions.explanation: Optical fibers ko join karne ke liye fusion splicing (fibers ko melt karke join karna) ya mechanical splicing (fibers ko align karke clamp karna) ka use hota hai.

questions.question: Ek dissatisfied customer ko kaise handle karna chahiye?

options.B: Uski problem ko sunna, empathy dikhana aur solution provide karna
options.D: Usse kahna ki wo galat hai

questions.explanation: Dissatisfied customer ko handle karne ka sabse accha tareeka hai unki problem ko sunna, unke perspective ko samajhna aur ek effective solution offer karna.

questions.question: DTH aur Cable TV technicians ke liye 'PPE' ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Protective Placement Equipment

questions.explanation: PPE (Personal Protective Equipment) mein safety helmet, gloves, safety shoes, safety harness jaisi cheezein shamil hoti hain jo technician ko kaam karte samay protect karti hain.

questions.question: DTH aur Cable TV mein 'OTT' services ka kya impact hai?

options.A: Ye services ko completely replace kar denge
options.B: Ye traditional TV services ke liye ek competition hain aur unhe evolve hone par majboor kar rahe hain
options.C: Ye services ka koi impact nahi hai
options.D: Ye services ko amplify karte hain

questions.explanation: OTT (Over-The-Top) services jaise Netflix, Amazon Prime video traditional DTH aur Cable TV ke liye ek bada competition hain, jisse unhe apne services aur offerings ko innovate karna pad raha hai.

questions.question: Ek technician ko apne tools aur equipment ko kaise maintain karna chahiye?

options.A: Unhe ganda aur kharab chhod dena
options.B: Regularly clean, inspect aur maintain karna

questions.explanation: Tools aur equipment ki proper maintenance unki life badhati hai, unki functionality maintain rakhti hai aur safety ensure karti hai.

questions.question: Coaxial cable ka impedance kitna hota hai jo DTH/Cable TV mein use hota hai?

options.B: 75 Ohm

questions.explanation: Standard DTH aur Cable TV systems mein 75 Ohm impedance wale coaxial cables (jaise RG-6, RG-11) use hote hain.

questions.question: Customer ko service call ke baad kya information deni chahiye?

options.B: Ki problem kya thi, kaise solve ki gayi aur future care tips
options.C: Sirf apne kaam ki tareef karna

questions.explanation: Customer ko poori information dena ki problem kya thi, kya steps liye gaye aur future mein problem se bachne ke liye kya karna chahiye, yeh good customer service ka part hai.

questions.question: DTH aur Cable TV mein 'HD' aur 'SD' mein kya antar hai?

options.B: HD ki resolution aur picture quality SD se behtar hoti hai
options.C: SD mein zyada channels milte hain
options.D: HD ka matlab hai High Demand

questions.explanation: HD (High Definition) ki resolution SD (Standard Definition) se kafi zyada hoti hai, jisse sharp aur clearer picture milti hai.

questions.question: 'Fiber to the Home' (FTTH) technology ka kya benefit hai?

options.A: Ye sirf voice calls ke liye hai
options.B: Ye wireless connection provide karta hai
options.C: Ye bahut high-speed internet aur data services provide karta hai

questions.explanation: FTTH mein fiber optic cable seedhe subscriber ke ghar tak aata hai, jisse extremely high-speed internet, TV aur phone services milti hain.

questions.question: Ek technician ko apne knowledge aur skills ko kaise update rakhna chahiye?

options.B: Regular training, workshops aur industry publications ko follow karke
options.C: Sirf apne co-workers se seekh kar

questions.explanation: Technology constantly evolve ho rahi hai, isliye technicians ko regular training aur self-learning ke through apne knowledge aur skills ko update rakhna bahut zaroori hai.
